message: 🌱 Add falco: Get pod data from Kubelet daemon or from container runtime. mission (#554)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "falco-1585-get-pod-data-from-kubelet-daemon-or-from-container-runtime",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "falco: Get pod data from Kubelet daemon or from container runtime.",
+    "description": "Get pod data from Kubelet daemon or from container runtime.. Requested by 9+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current falco deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your falco version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n falco -l app.kubernetes.io/name=falco\nhelm list -n falco 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working falco installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review falco configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant falco configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n falco -l app.kubernetes.io/name=falco\nkubectl get configmap -n falco -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=falco\n```\n**Motivation**\n\nIt is possible that the k8s api is inaccessible. Then falco won't be able to augment the logged events with k8s entities data (like pod name, namespace etc.)."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Get pod data from Kubelet daemon or from container runtime.",
+        "description": "Apply the configuration change to resolve the issue:\n```yaml\n[root@centos1 ~]# crictl inspectp 2993a90635be4\n{\n  \"status\": {\n    \"id\": \"2993a90635be497dfabb8f6ca30ebfd0da7a3060d4c4a113f4b991a7e9c17617\",\n    \"metadata\": {\n      \"attempt\": 8,\n      \"name\": \"nginx-gvisor\", <=====\n      \"namespace\": \"default\", <=====\n      \"uid\": \"516fc7b8-02bd-436d-8b1e-3b1a3f4fa318\"\n    },\n    \"state\": \"SANDBOX_READY\",\n    \"createdAt\": \"2021-03-16T12:51:01.012620952Z\",\n    \"network\": {\n      \"ip\": \"10.20.0.133\"\n    },\n    \"linux\": {\n      \"namespaces\": {\n        \"options\": {\n          \"ipc\": \"POD\",\n          \"network\": \"POD\",\n          \"pid\": \"CONTAINER\"\n        }\n      }\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n falco -l app.kubernetes.io/name=falco\nkubectl get events -n falco --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Get pod data from Kubelet daemon or from container runtime.\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "See the linked issue and PR for the community-verified solution.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "[root@centos1 ~]# crictl inspectp 2993a90635be4\n{\n  \"status\": {\n    \"id\": \"2993a90635be497dfabb8f6ca30ebfd0da7a3060d4c4a113f4b991a7e9c17617\",\n    \"metadata\": {\n      \"attempt\": 8,\n      \"name\": \"nginx-gvisor\", <=====\n      \"namespace\": \"default\", <=====\n      \"uid\": \"516fc7b8-02bd-436d-8b1e-3b1a3f4fa318\"\n    },\n    \"state\": \"SANDBOX_READY\",\n    \"createdAt\": \"2021-03-16T12:51:01.012620952Z\",\n    \"network\": {\n      \"ip\": \"10.20.0.133\"\n    },\n    \"linux\": {\n      \"namespaces\": {\n        \"options\": {\n          \"ipc\": \"POD\",\n          \"network\": \"POD\",\n          \"pid\": \"CONTAINER\"\n        }\n      }\n    },\n    \"labels\": {\n      \"io.kubernetes.pod.name\": \"nginx-gvisor\", <=====\n      \"io.kubernetes.pod.namespace\": \"default\", <=====\n      \"io.kubernetes.pod.uid\": \"516fc7b8-02bd-436d-8b1e-3b1a3f4fa3"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
